users.title: Users
users.description: Manage user accounts, assigned roles, and availability status.

stats.active_desc: Profiles marked as available for access.

actions.search_placeholder: Search by name, email, username or role...

delete_dialog.title: Delete user
delete_dialog.description: Are you sure you want to delete this user? This action is irreversible.

form.description_create: Register a new access account for the system.
form.description_edit: Update registration data and user access role.

validations.name_min: Name must be at least 2 characters.
validations.username_min: Username must be at least 3 characters.

access_control.title: Access Control
access_control.description: Manage IP blocks, regional policies, user rules, and location requirements.

stat_cards.active_blocks_desc: IPs, ranges, and blocks currently applied.
stat_cards.user_restrictions_desc: Sum of individual IP and time rules.

ip_blocks_tab.no_permission_title: No permission to list IP blocks
ip_blocks_tab.no_permission_desc: Your profile doesn't have the necessary permission to view this tab.
ip_blocks_tab.delete_desc: Are you sure you want to delete this IP block? This action is irreversible.

ip_block_form.desc: Configure specific blocks, ranges, or CIDR blocks to prevent access.
ip_block_form.placeholder_desc: Detail the motivation or context of the rule.
ip_block_form.active_hint: When disabled, the record is saved but not applied.

region_rules_tab.no_permission_title: No permission to list region rules
region_rules_tab.no_permission_desc: Your profile doesn't have access to list country or region policies.
region_rules_tab.delete_desc: Are you sure you want to delete this region rule? This action is irreversible.

region_rule_form.desc: Define explicitly allowed or blocked countries using ISO code.
region_rule_form.action_hint: Select whether the region will be allowed or blocked.
region_rule_form.placeholder_desc: Explain the reason or scope of this policy.
region_rule_form.active_hint: Inactive rules remain registered, but are no longer applied.

user_ip_rules_tab.no_permission_title: No permission to list user IP rules
user_ip_rules_tab.no_permission_desc: Your profile doesn't have the necessary permission to view this tab.
user_ip_rules_tab.delete_desc: Are you sure you want to delete this user IP rule? This action is irreversible.

user_ip_rule_form.desc: Restrict or allow specific IP origins for a system user.
user_ip_rule_form.placeholder_desc: Include observations relevant to the operation.
user_ip_rule_form.desc_hint: Useful to document the justification of the exception or block.
user_ip_rule_form.active_hint: The rule remains saved for auditing even when disabled.

user_schedule_rules_tab.no_permission_title: No permission to list schedule restrictions
user_schedule_rules_tab.no_permission_desc: Your profile doesn't have the necessary permission to view this tab.
user_schedule_rules_tab.delete_desc: Are you sure you want to delete this schedule rule? This action is irreversible.

user_schedule_rule_form.val_start_time_format: Enter the start time in HH:mm format.
user_schedule_rule_form.val_end_time_format: Enter the end time in HH:mm format.
user_schedule_rule_form.desc: Control access windows per user with time range and days of the week.
user_schedule_rule_form.action_desc: Select the action applied in this time window.
user_schedule_rule_form.end_time_desc: Use the same format as start.
user_schedule_rule_form.days_desc: If no day is selected, the rule applies to all days.
user_schedule_rule_form.placeholder_desc: Document the policy or operational context.

location_requirements_tab.no_permission_desc: Your profile lacks permission to view history or manage location requirements.

location_report_dialog.title: Location history
location_report_dialog.desc_no_user: Select a user to view the history.
location_report_dialog.map_empty_title: No point to display on the map
location_report_dialog.map_empty_desc: Adjust search or wait for new location records.
location_report_dialog.timeline_desc: Click on a record to highlight the point on the map.
location_report_dialog.map_load_error_desc: Check the API key and the restrictions configured in the project.

backup.title: System Backup
backup.description: Manage snapshots, restores, and backup automation for the environment.

details_dialog.title: Backup details
details_dialog.desc: Technical info of the selected file.

history_tab.no_permission_desc: Your profile lacks permissions to view or operate backups.
history_tab.search: Search by file, origin, status or note...
history_tab.no_permission_list_desc: Your profile doesn't have access to the backup history yet.

settings_tab.val_schedule: Set a time to enable automatic backup.
settings_tab.val_password: The password must be at least 8 characters.
settings_tab.val_notes: Notes can have at most 256 characters.
settings_tab.no_permission_desc: Your profile lacks access to backup automation rules.
settings_tab.form_auto_desc: Enable scheduling to generate recurring system backups.
settings_tab.pwd_desc: Enter the password used by automatic backup.
settings_tab.placeholder_notes: Describe policy, retention or operational context.
settings_tab.info_maintain: A password is already stored for automation. Leave the field blank to keep the current password.

create_dialog.val_pwd_min: The backup password must be at least 8 characters.
create_dialog.val_pwd_max: The backup password must be at most 128 characters.
create_dialog.val_notes: Notes can have at most 256 characters.
create_dialog.title: New backup
create_dialog.desc: Generate an encrypted database snapshot with a restore password.
create_dialog.placeholder_notes: Explain the reason or context for this generation.

restore_dialog.val_pwd_min: The password must be at least 8 characters.
restore_dialog.val_pwd_max: The password must be at most 128 characters.
restore_dialog.title: Restore backup
restore_dialog.desc: Use the password for file {file} to validate or apply restoration.

restore_upload_dialog.val_pwd_min: The password must be at least 8 characters.
restore_upload_dialog.val_pwd_max: The password must be at most 128 characters.
restore_upload_dialog.error_no_file: Select a backup file to continue.
restore_upload_dialog.title: Restore file
restore_upload_dialog.desc: Upload an `.mmsbkp` file to validate or apply manual restoration.

stat_cards.card_total_desc: Records available for download and restore.
stat_cards.card_last_desc_on: Time of the last automated backup recorded.

permissions.title: Access Administration
permissions.description: Manage roles, API permissions, profile assignments, and frontend screens.

roles_tab.delete_dialog_desc: Are you sure you want to delete this role? This action is irreversible.

permissions_tab.delete_dialog_desc: Are you sure you want to delete this permission? This action is irreversible.

assignment_tab.empty_desc: Adjust search to find permissions within available groups.
assignment_tab.start_desc: Choose a role in the top bar to view and consolidate its API permissions.
assignment_tab.error_role_perms: Error loading permissions for this role.

screens_tab.empty_desc: Adjust search to find screens within available groups.
screens_tab.start_desc: Choose a role in the top bar to view and consolidate allowed frontend screens.
screens_tab.success: Screens updated successfully. Re-login to apply to local menu.
screens_tab.error_role_screens: Error loading allowed screens for this role.

stats.screens_desc: Routes and screens mapped for web access.

role_form.desc_new: Fill in the details to create a new role.
role_form.placeholder_desc: Brief description of the responsibilities for this role...
role_form.error_save: An error occurred while saving the role.
role_form.val_name_min: The name must be at least 2 characters.

permission_form.desc_new: Define a new custom permission in the system.
permission_form.error_save: An error occurred while saving the permission.
permission_form.val_name_min: The name must be at least 2 characters.

ui_settings.title: UI Settings
ui_settings.description: Customize appearance, visual behavior and system preferences.

theme.title: Color Themes
theme.description: Choose the color palette that best matches your style.
theme.sources_description: Choose the origin of the global palette and keep local preview before persisting for all users.

shadcn.title: System base theme
shadcn.description: Uses presets compatible with the project main palette.

tweakcn.title: External preset
tweakcn.description: Loads curated presets from Tweakcn with the same tokens contract.

imported.title: Imported theme
imported.description: Allows importing a CSS with :root and .dark blocks for global override.

imported_section.title: Imported theme
imported_section.description: Use exported CSS to persist your own set of variables.
imported_section.hint_1: Importing only changes the local preview until clicking Save changes.
imported_section.hint_2: Individual light/dark preference remains controlled by each user in the header icon.

overrides.title: Color Overrides
overrides.description: Adjust global semantic tokens only. The value is saved as override on top of the active preset.

layout.title: Layout Settings
layout.description: Adjust panels behavior, menus and page structure.
layout.sidebar_structure_desc: Define the structural style of the administrative shell used by all users.
layout.sidebar_behavior_desc: Controls collapsible behavior and space allocation.
layout.sidebar_side_desc: Positions the sidebar on the left or right side of the interface.

sidebar.title: Default
sidebar.description: Classic sidebar structure integrated with the shell.

floating.title: Floating
floating.description: Elevated sidebar with a floating panel feel.

inset.title: Inset
inset.description: Inset sidebar with margins and emphasized corners.

offcanvas.title: Off canvas
offcanvas.description: Moves completely out of view when collapsed.

icon.title: Icons
icon.description: Collapses into a compact rail with icons only.

import_dialog.title: Import CSS Theme
import_dialog.description: Paste the exported CSS containing the :root and .dark blocks. The variables will be persisted as a global theme.
import_dialog.hint: Use the same system variables contract. The preview will be applied immediately before saving.
import_dialog.error_msg: Could not import the provided CSS.
import_dialog.error_blocks: Include the :root and .dark blocks with the CSS variables of the imported theme.
import_dialog.error_vars: Could not extract enough variables from the provided CSS.

notifications.save_success: Global layout and theme configuration updated.
notifications.load_error_desc: Try reloading the module data to restore the system's visual pattern preview and editing.

theme_source.title: Theme Source
theme_source.description: Global preset used as the visual base.

theme_mode.title: Default Mode
theme_mode.description: Initial mode applied across the application.

radius.title: Global Radius
radius.description: Central token used by system border radii.

shell.title: Sidebar Shell
shell.description: Structure and behavior of the global sidebar.

logs.title: System Logs
logs.description: Monitor API calls and audit events with advanced filters.

notifications.load_users_error: Could not load users for the filter.

placeholders.error: Search by name, message or stack...

details.title: Log Details
details.empty: Select a log to view its details.

calendar.title: Calendar
calendar.description: Manage your appointments, events and reminders.

form.description_create: Add a new event to your calendar

chat.title: Messages
chat.no_conversation: Select a conversation to start chatting
chat.no_results_search: No conversations found matching your search

account_profile.val_cur_pwd: Enter current password to change password.
account_profile.val_new_pwd_len: New password must be at least 8 characters.
account_profile.card_data_desc: Update basic details used in the system and shown on your profile.
account_profile.form_user_desc: This identifier can be used in integrations and internal logs.
account_profile.card_sec_desc: Fill the fields below only to change your password.

account.title: Account Settings
account.description: Manage your access details, profile information and security preferences.

errors.load: Could not load your account data.

error_state.title: Failed to load your account
error_state.description: The authenticated user data could not be loaded.

role.title: Current Role
role.description: Profile currently applied to your account in the system.

location_required.title: Location required
location_required.description: Operational rule currently applied to your login.

companies.title: Companies
companies.description: Manage partner companies, user associations, and operational status.

delete_dialog.title: Delete company
delete_dialog.description: Are you sure you want to delete this company? This action is irreversible.

form.description_create: Register a new company and its tax data.

validations.name_min: Name must be at least 2 characters.
